figures.spec_inline:
S100: Receive Request
S200: Authenticate
S300: Valid? [diamond]
S400: Process Request
S500: Return Response
S600: Return Error
figures.label: FIG. 1

figures.spec_inline:
IDLE: 200 Idle [initial]
ACTIVE: 210 Active
ERROR: 220 Error
IDLE -> ACTIVE: start()
ACTIVE -> IDLE: stop()
ACTIVE -> ERROR: fault()
ERROR -> IDLE: reset()
figures.label: FIG. 2
